## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] `pyright src/` passes locally (or CI is green)
- [ ] `pytest` passes (if behavior changed)
- [ ] Docs updated when user-facing APIs or workflows change
- [ ] Example or usage snippet added for new features (in PR description or `docs/` / `examples/`)

## Testing

How did you verify this change?
